'''lamasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyte|kyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyte|kyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lamasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læmæshæth|læmæshæth]] || [[word:læmæshæj|læmæshæj]] || [[word:læmæshæsh|læmæshæsh]] || [[word:læmæshæ|læmæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lamamashath|lamamashath]] || [[word:lamamashaj|lamamashaj]] || [[word:lamamashash|lamamashash]] || [[word:lamamasha|lamamasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lamashath|lamashath]] || [[word:lamashaj|lamashaj]] || [[word:lamashash|lamashash]] || [[word:lamasha|lamasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lamafshath|lamafshath]] || [[word:lamafshaj|lamafshaj]] || [[word:lamafshash|lamafshash]] || [[word:lamafshaf|lamafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lamashatha|lamashatha]] || [[word:lamashaja|lamashaja]] || [[word:lamashasha|lamashasha]] || [[word:lamashaka|lamashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lamashath|lamashath]] || [[word:lamashaj|lamashaj]] || [[word:lamashash|lamashash]] || [[word:lamasha|lamasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lamashathal|lamashathal]] || [[word:lamashajal|lamashajal]] || [[word:lamashashal|lamashashal]] || [[word:lamashakal|lamashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lamashathatha|lamashathatha]] || [[word:lamashajaja|lamashajaja]] || [[word:lamashashasha|lamashashasha]] || [[word:lamashaka|lamashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lamashathan|lamashathan]] || [[word:lamashajan|lamashajan]] || [[word:lamashashan|lamashashan]] || [[word:lamashakan|lamashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lamashathaoro|lamashathaoro]] || [[word:lamashajaoro|lamashajaoro]] || [[word:lamashashaoro|lamashashaoro]] || [[word:lamashakaoro|lamashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
